Log:
  - Update to 1.9.

@@ -2,11 +2,11 @@

 PORTNAME=	rand
-PORTVERSION=	1.8

 CATEGORIES=	textproc
 MASTER_SITES=	http://bzflag.bz/~erik/files/
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	danilogondolfo@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Utility to display files or streams in random order
 
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
